testcase.name: validateJsonSchema

failure.message:
1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: instance type (array) does not match any allowed primitive type (allowed: ["object"]) level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"file:/C:/Users/anagh/OneDrive/Desktop/New%20folder/Java%20Selenium/testing-demo/target/test-classes/storeJsonSchema.json#","pointer":"/definitions/Welcome10"} instance: {"pointer":""} domain: "validation" keyword: "type" found: "array" expected: ["object"]
Actual: [ { "Author": "John", "category": "india", "price": "10", "title": "Book1", "id": "61tP_HGIBrk" }, { "Author": "John1", "category": "india1", "price": "10", "title": "Book2", "id": "pnljfog9f0w" }, { "Author": "John3", "category": "india3", "price": "10", "title": "Book3", "id": "6cj8FVKcQwo" } ]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: instance type (array) does not match any allowed primitive type (allowed: ["object"]) level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"file:/C:/Users/anagh/OneDrive/Desktop/New%20folder/Java%20Selenium/testing-demo/target/test-classes/storeJsonSchema.json#","pointer":"/definitions/Welcome10"} instance: {"pointer":""} domain: "validation" keyword: "type" found: "array" expected: ["object"]
Actual: [ { "Author": "John", "category": "india", "price": "10", "title": "Book1", "id": "61tP_HGIBrk" }, { "Author": "John1", "category": "india1", "price": "10", "title": "Book2", "id": "pnljfog9f0w" }, { "Author": "John3", "category": "india3", "price": "10", "title": "Book3", "id": "6cj8FVKcQwo" } ]
